title: New Hampshire: First in the Nation in major UFO encounters, Part 2
description: Part 2: New Hampshire's unique connection to documented UFO encounters and the author who wrote about them.

title: US Government 'Knows Multiple Alien Species' Yet Critics Still Demand Proof Beyond Blurry UFO Footage
description: Claims of US government knowledge of multiple alien species resurface as former officials allege awareness, but Pentagon reviews find no evidence of extraterrestrial involvement.

title: UFO experts react to latest US government UAP file release

description: 'Disclosure Day' director Steven Spielberg believes a breakthrough in UFO and alien encounters is finally about to happen after years of government disclosures.

title: Pentagon UFO Files Reveal Surge in Red Orb Sightings Across Newly Released Investigations
description: The Pentagon's latest declassified files reveal multiple reports of glowing red orb sightings in the northeastern U.S., highlighting ongoing investigations into unidentified anomalous phenomena
